log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kalashtar — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Kalashtar — Iron Concentration HP: 33/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Kalashtar — Iron Concentration.
→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Kalashtar — Iron Concentration HP: 21/67
--- Kalashtar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:6+3=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 132/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kalashtar — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Kalashtar — Iron Concentration HP: -5/67
